scripts.lint: eslint . --max-warnings=0 && npm run lint:boundaries --silent && npm run lint:migrations --silent
scripts.test: npm run build --silent && vitest run && node --test services/retorno/__tests__/*.test.mjs tests/contract/*.test.mjs tests/certificado/*.test.mjs tests/golden/*.test.mjs tests/handler/*.test.mjs tests/pki/*.test.mjs tests/returns/*.test.mjs tests/xml/*.test.mjs
scripts.coverage: npm run build --silent && vitest run --coverage && node --test --experimental-test-coverage services/retorno/__tests__/*.test.mjs tests/contract/*.test.mjs tests/certificado/*.test.mjs tests/golden/*.test.mjs tests/handler/*.test.mjs tests/pki/*.test.mjs tests/returns/*.test.mjs tests/xml/*.test.mjs
scripts.test:integration: npm run build --silent && npm run templates:check --silent && node --test tests/integration/*.test.mjs tests/integration/localstack/*.test.mjs tests/integration/retry/*.test.mjs tests/soap/*.test.mjs
